_comment: Baseline for audit-text-html-ratio.mjs. Numbers must only DECREASE — this gate is a ratchet. Regenerate after lowering offenders by improving a template; never raise the numbers without explicit justification (it means new pages dropped below the 10 % text/HTML ratio Semrush flags as "low text/HTML"). 2026-04-28 rebaseline (agent C) post rich-job-card refactor (agents A+B): the new SPA-card payload (titleByLocale, salary, contract, canton, postedAt, logo) added real visible text to every job listing on job-board, weekly-employers, and editorial landings. Result: total 1564→155 (−1409); every retained bucket strictly decreased; career-landings (95→0) and border-wait (3→0) cleared and dropped from the map. The follow-up TODO from the previous comment (commuter-context prose for jobsSeoPagesPlugin SPA-card template) is effectively delivered by the rich card itself.
